response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering with 15+ years and a strong technical background, including leadership roles and entrepreneurial experience. However, his focus has been more on general software development, web/mobile platforms, and GIS rather than deep AI/cloud specialization. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks is promising but not yet fully aligned with the core AI strategy role.
strengths: 15+ years of progressive software engineering experience with leadership and entrepreneurial roles
Strong expertise in diverse tech stacks (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js, React, Kubernetes) and full-stack development
Proven ability to build and scale platforms, including open-source projects like GISCollective
concerns: Limited explicit AI/cloud expertise, with no PhD or advanced AI degree mentioned in education
No clear demonstration of building AI-powered products or platforms as a primary focus
Recent AI work (AI-agent infrastructure) is tangential rather than strategic AI leadership
